title: Hedge knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Duncan the Tall, known as Dunk in his years as squire, is a young hedge knight.

title: Prince
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Prince Aegon Targaryen, also known as Egg, is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty and the squire of Ser Duncan the Tall.

title: Prince of Dragonstone and Hand of the King
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Prince Baelor Targaryen was the eldest son of King Daeron II Targaryen and Queen Myriah Martell. In addition to being heir to the Iron Throne, Baelor served as the Hand of the King to his father.

title: Prince
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Prince Maekar Targaryen was the fourth son of Daeron II Targaryen and Myriah Martell.

title: Prince
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Prince Aerion Targaryen, nicknamed Aerion Brightflame, is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty.

title: Prince and knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Prince Daeron Targaryen is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty.

title: Prince
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Prince Valarr Targaryen is the son and heir of Baelor Targaryen. Following his father's death after the trial of seven of Duncan the Tall, he becomes the heir to the Iron Throne.

title: Knight and heir to Storm's End
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Lyonel Baratheon, called the Laughing Storm, is the heir to Storm's End during the reign of Daeron II.

title: Lord and knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Lord Steffon Fossoway is a newly raised lord, and a knight of House Fossoway of Cider Hall during the reign of Daeron II.

title: Knight and founder of House Fossoway of New Barrel
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Raymun Fossoway is a knight of House Fossoway. He is the founder of House Fossoway of New Barrel.

title: Puppeteer and mummer
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Tanselle is a Dornishwoman living during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen. She is a member of a troupe of Dornish puppeteers and mummers who perform during the tourney at Ashford Meadow.

title: Blacksmith
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Steely Pate is a blacksmith in the Reach during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen.

title: Steward of Ashford and master of the games
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Plummer is the steward of Ashford during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen. He serves as the master of the games at the tourney at Ashford Meadow.

title: Prostitute
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Beony is a prostitute living during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen.

title: Lady of Fossoway of New Barrel
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Lady Rowan Fossoway is the lady of House Fossoway of New Barrel living during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen. She was formerly a prostitute named Red.

title: Lady
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Gwin Ashford is the daughter of Lord Ashford.

title: Hedge knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Arlan of Pennytree was a hedge knight and the mentor of Duncan the Tall. His personal heraldry displays a winged silver chalice on a brown field beneath a blue chevron.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Manfred Dondarrion is a knight of House Dondarrion.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Humfrey Hardyng is a knight during the reign of Daeron II. He is present at the tourney at Ashford Meadow and fights alongside Ser Duncan the Tall in his trial of seven.

title: Lord of Ashford
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Lord Ashford is the Lord of Ashford and head of House Ashford during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Roland Crakehall is a knight of House Crakehall and member of the Kingsguard of Daeron II.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Humfrey Beesbury is a knight of House Beesbury during the reign of Daeron II. He is present at the tourney at Ashford Meadow and fights alongside Ser Duncan the Tall in his trial of seven.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Robyn Rhysling is a knight during the reign of Daeron II.

title: Lord
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Lord Medgar Tully is the Lord of Riverrun and head of House Tully during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Lord Leo Tyrell, called Longthorn, is the Lord of Highgarden and head of House Tyrell during the reign of Daeron II Targaryen.

title: Knight
tvShow: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: Ser Donnel of Duskendale is a knight of the Kingsguard of Daeron II.
